html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Brightshade Helm is a craftable head Armor exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be crafted while next to the Brightsmithy, requiring 4 Pure Brilliance and 2 Brightshade Husks to craft.

The Brightshade Helm has a Durability of 830. It absorbs 80% of received physical damage and 10 flat received Planar Damage.

An extra 10% protection is added after the initial 80% (total 82%) to physical protection from Lunar Aligned creatures. When combined with the Brightshade Armor, the total physical damage protection against Lunar Aligned creatures increases to 85%, as the extra protection added after the initial 80% becomes 25% instead of 10%.

Additionally, 10% Planar Protection is added before the flat Planar Defense against Lunar Aligned creatures. When combined with the Brightshade Armor, this bonus becomes 25%. This manner of protection is much more effective than the physical damage counterpart.

The Brightshade Helm also negates both the vision loss and slowdown from Sandstorms, Moonstorms, and Miasma. It does not protect against the damage from Miasma.

When the Brightshade Helm is worn, the following bonuses are added.

  • Prevents Charlie attacks when standing in darkness.
  • Damage dealt by the Brightshade Sword, Brightshade Smasher and Brightshade Shoevel increases by +10% for physical damage and +5 flat planar damage.
  • Pacifying Gestalts.
  • The Brightshade Staff's projectile bounces 6 times instead of 4.

When the Brightshade Helm's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one Brightshade Repair Kit.

Contents

  • 1 Skill Tree (Wortox)
    • 1.1 Lunar Swindler
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Assets

Skill Tree (Wortox)

Lunar Swindler

While a Soul Echo is active, Wortox will ignore one hit of damage when wearing a Brightshade Helm or Brightshade Armor, identical to the effects of Bone Armor. This consumes the active Soul Echo.

Skins

“It makes me look even brighter then usual.”
–Wilson
“How am I supposed to see in this thing?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang feels very safe inside.”
–Wolfgang
“It lets me hide my face from the world.”
–Wendy
“ACTIVATE HEADLIGHTS”
–WX-78
“It does not fit well over my glasses, but I suppose I must make do.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's got me feelin' a bit light-headed.”
–Woodie
“It looks wonderfully ominous.”
–Maxwell
“A förmidable helm. burning with an unearthly flames!”
–Wigfrid
“We're gonna be a spider knight!”
–Webber
“An extra layer for my head.”
–Warly
“Mean friend made nice hat”
–Wormwood
“It should keep my noggin' nice and safe.”
–Winona
“It has me looking on the bright side hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Cage for head, florp?”
–Wurt
“That's definitely the helmet of some kind of ghost knight!”
–Walter
“It's incredible that I can see anything while wearing it.”
–Wanda
The Brightshade Helm is a craftable head Armor exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be crafted while next to the Brightsmithy, requiring 4 Pure Brilliance and 2 Brightshade Husks to craft.
The Brightshade Helm has a Durability of 830. It absorbs 80% of received physical damage and 10 flat received Planar Damage.
An extra 10% protection is added after the initial 80% (total 82%) to physical protection from Lunar Aligned creatures. When combined with the Brightshade Armor, the total physical damage protection against Lunar Aligned creatures increases to 85%, as the extra protection added after the initial 80% becomes 25% instead of 10%.
Additionally, 10% Planar Protection is added before the flat Planar Defense against Lunar Aligned creatures. When combined with the Brightshade Armor, this bonus becomes 25%. This manner of protection is much more effective than the physical damage counterpart.
The Brightshade Helm also negates both the vision loss and slowdown from Sandstorms, Moonstorms, and Miasma. It does not protect against the damage from Miasma.
When the Brightshade Helm is worn, the following bonuses are added.
Prevents Charlie attacks when standing in darkness.
Damage dealt by the Brightshade Sword, Brightshade Smasher and Brightshade Shoevel increases by +10% for physical damage and +5 flat planar damage.
Pacifying Gestalts.
The Brightshade Staff's projectile bounces 6 times instead of 4.

title: Brightshade Helm

{{Object Infobox |icon = Brightshade Helm.png |equipslot=head |image= Brightshade Helm Dropped.png|Normal Brightshade Helm Dropped Broken.png|Broken |repaired = Repaired By: {{Pic|40|Brightshade Repair Kit}} |scrapbook_description =Glows in the dark and augments the Brightshade Staff with more projectile bounces.
Gives lunar weapons with Planar Damage a boost. |description=Luminescent protection for your precious cranium. |ingredient1=Pure Brilliance |multiplier1=4 |ingredient2=Brightshade Husk |multiplier2=2 |filter= {{Pic32|Brightsmithy Filter}} |tier=30 |spawnCode="lunarplanthat" |durability=830 HP |perk=Prevents Charlie attacks when standing in darkness. Increases efficacy of Brightshade items. Protects the player from [[Sandstorm]]s and [[Moonstorm]]s. |waterResistance=35% |protection=80% (82% vs [[Lunar Aligned]])
(85% vs Lunar Aligned w/ {{pic24|Brightshade Armor}}) |planar_protection=10 flat (10% applied before flat vs Lunar Aligned)
(25% applied before flat vs Lunar Aligned w/ {{pic24|Brightshade Armor}})}} {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Rift Content|Lunar Rift}} {{Quotes |wilson = It makes me look even brighter then usual. |willow = How am I supposed to see in this thing? |wolfgang = Wolfgang feels very safe inside. |wendy = It lets me hide my face from the world. |wx78 = ACTIVATE HEADLIGHTS |wickerbottom = It does not fit well over my glasses, but I suppose I must make do. |woodie = It's got me feelin' a bit light-headed. |maxwell = It looks wonderfully ominous. |wigfrid = A förmidable helm. burning with an unearthly flames! |webber = We're gonna be a spider knight! |winona = It should keep my noggin' nice and safe. |warly = An extra layer for my head. |wortox = It has me looking on the bright side hyuyu! |wormwood = Mean friend made nice hat |wurt = Cage for head, florp? |walter = That's definitely the helmet of some kind of ghost knight! |wanda = It's incredible that I can see anything while wearing it. |choose = maxwell}} The '''Brightshade Helm''' is a craftable head [[Armor]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It can only be crafted while next to the [[Brightsmithy]], requiring 4 [[Pure Brilliance]] and 2 [[Brightshade Husk]]s to craft. The Brightshade Helm has a [[Durability]] of 830. It absorbs 80% of received physical damage and 10 flat received [[Planar Damage]]. An extra 10% protection is added ''after'' the initial 80% (total 82%) to physical protection from [[Lunar Aligned]] creatures. When combined with the [[Brightshade Armor]], the total physical damage protection against Lunar Aligned creatures increases to 85%, as the extra protection added after the initial 80% becomes 25% instead of 10%. Additionally, 10% Planar Protection is added ''before'' the flat Planar Defense against Lunar Aligned creatures. When combined with the Brightshade Armor, this bonus becomes 25%. This manner of protection is much more effective than the physical damage counterpart. The Brightshade Helm also negates both the vision loss and slowdown from [[Sandstorm]]s, [[Moonstorm]]s, and [[Miasma]]. It does not protect against the damage from [[Miasma]]. When the Brightshade Helm is worn, the following bonuses are added. * Prevents Charlie attacks when standing in darkness. * Damage dealt by the [[Brightshade Sword]], [[Brightshade Smasher]] and [[Brightshade Shoevel]] increases by +10% for physical damage and +5 flat planar damage. * Pacifying [[Gestalt]]s. * The [[Brightshade Staff]]'s projectile bounces 6 times instead of 4. When the Brightshade Helm's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one [[Brightshade Repair Kit]]. =={{pic|32|Insight}} Skill Tree (Wortox)== ==={{picDark|32|Lunar Swindler}} Lunar Swindler=== While a [[Soul Echo]] is active, Wortox will ignore one hit of damage when wearing a Brightshade Helm or Brightshade Armor, identical to the effects of [[Bone Armor]]. This consumes the active Soul Echo. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head items|Belongings}}
